---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-shell}
<div class="eyebrow">Publications</div>

# Publications

Peer-reviewed articles and research outputs are listed newest first. Publication status and persistent links are shown for each record.
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.page-shell}
<div class="filters" aria-label="Filter publications">
<button class="filter-button active" data-pub-filter="all">All</button>
<button class="filter-button" data-pub-filter="preference">Preferences & choice</button>
<button class="filter-button" data-pub-filter="public-health">Public health policy</button>
<button class="filter-button" data-pub-filter="other">Other applied economics</button>
</div>

<div class="publication-list">
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Guidance or Misdirection? Unpacking the Role of Feedback in Health Preference Assessments</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Shelby D. Reed; Semra Ozdemir</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Economics</em>, 35, 910–928 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.70093">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Community First or My Body First? Moral Values and Vaccine Mandate Preferences</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin Genie; Fabio I. Martinenghi; Francesco Paolucci; Jonathan Lake; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth; Margie Danchin; Teresa Gavaruzzi; Udo Evers</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Australian and New Zealand Journal of Public Health</em>, 50, 100496 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.anzjph.2026.100496">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">No Jab, No Access? Preferences for Vaccine Mandates in Europe and Australia</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin Genie; Fabio I. Martinenghi; Francesco Paolucci; Jonathan Lake; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth; Jessica Kaufman; Margie Danchin; Jeremy K. Ward; Teresa Gavaruzzi</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Australian and New Zealand Journal of Public Health</em>, 50, 100450 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.anzjph.2026.100450">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Priority for Self or Others? Incorporating Equity Considerations in a Preference-Based Health Value Assessment</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 29, 467–475 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.10.011">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Jabs or Societal Restrictions? Public Preferences for Vaccination Programmes in South Africa</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Aregawi G. Gebremariam; Mesfin G. Genie; Beidemaryam Wondwosen Admasu; D. Abegaz; J. G. Gatua; Surachat Ngorsuraches; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 15, 101195 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101195">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Jabs and Lockdowns: Public Preferences for Vaccination Programmes in Chile</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Stefano Bruzzo-Gallardo; Josefa Henriquez; Mesfin G. Genie</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 15, 101196 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101196">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Vaccine Uptake in the Context of Mandate Announcement and Removal: Evidence from Europe and North America</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Aregawi G. Gebremariam; Mesfin Genie; Huong Le; Annette K. Regan; Frank H. Beard; Kristine Macartney; Francesco Paolucci; Hannah C. Moore; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Vaccine</em>, 88, 128825 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.vaccine.2026.128825">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Fit for Purpose? Assessing the Robustness of Discrete Choice Experiment Designs in the Context of Evolving Health Technologies</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Verity Watson; Michaël Schwarzinger; Stéphane Luchini</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Social Science &amp; Medicine</em>, 404, 119463 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2026.119463">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Time Preferences and COVID-19 Vaccination Uptake</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Arthur E. Attema; Marcello Antonini; Mesfin Genie; Aleksandra Torbica; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>The European Journal of Health Economics</em>, 27, 47–63 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s10198-025-01801-7">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="other">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Immigration and Preventive Care Utilization in Europe: Evidence from Retrospective Data</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Raluca Elena Buia; Mesfin Genie; Cristina Elisa Orso; Giacomo Pasini</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Empirical Economics</em>, 70 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00181-026-02928-z">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Shots or Shutdowns? Public Preferences for COVID-19 Vaccines and Societal Restrictions in the US</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Ibrahim Alfayoumi; Mesfin G. Genie; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 15, 101152 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2025.101152">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Understanding Vaccine Acceptance through Construal-Level Theory of Psychological Distance: Evidence from Singapore and South Korea</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Yevgen Bogodistov; Mesfin Genie; Ayman Fouda</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 15, 101148 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2025.101148">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Feeling Lonely? Preferences for Support Programmes to Reduce Loneliness among Older Adults in Australia: A Discrete Choice Experiment</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Allison W. Boyes; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy</em>, 167, 105587 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.healthpol.2026.105587">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Vaccination Policies and Hesitancy: Preferences, Trade-offs and Future Challenges</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Chiara Berardi; Ayman Fouda; Mesfin Genie; Aleksandra Torbica</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 15, 101246 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2026.101246">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2026</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">An Open Repository of COVID-19 Vaccine Mandate Studies with a Worked Scoping Review of Quasi-experimental Evidence</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Fabio I. Martinenghi; Tushar P. Ojha; Anaïs Thomasson; Bianca Devsam; Sarah Drislane; Stavros Vasiliadis; Chiara Berardi; Aregawi Gebremariam; Arianna Dipalma; Teresa Gavaruzzi; Jeremy K. Ward; Francesco Paolucci; Margie Danchin; Mesfin Genie; Katie Attwell; Christopher C. Blyth</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>npj Vaccines</em>, 11, 01454 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41541-026-01454-4">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2025</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">The Role of Heterogeneity of Patients’ Preferences in Kidney Transplantation</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Antonio Nicolò; Giacomo Pasini</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>SSRN Electronic Journal</em> · <span class="status working">Earlier version</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.3428620">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2025</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Democracy, Trust, and Political Orientation: Disentangling Mechanisms Shaping Individuals’ Vaccine Attitudes</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin Genie</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Journal of Health Politics, Policy and Law</em> · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1215/03616878-12166725">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2025</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Are We Ready for the Next Pandemic? Public Preferences and Trade-offs between Vaccine Characteristics and Societal Restrictions across 21 Countries</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Marcello Antonini; Mesfin G. Genie; Katie Attwell; Arthur E. Attema; Jeremy K. Ward; Alessia Melegaro; Aleksandra Torbica; Brian Kelly; Chiara Berardi; Ana Rita Sequeira; N. McGregor; A. Kellner; Shuli Brammli-Greenberg; Madeleine Hinwood; L. Murauskiene; Daiga Behmane; Zsolt J. Balogh; Terje P. Hagen; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Social Science &amp; Medicine</em>, 366, 117687 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2025.117687">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2025</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Important Continuous Glucose Monitoring Attributes for Patients with Type 2 Diabetes</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Tim C. Lai; Heather P. Whitley; Mesfin Genie; Robert H. Eckel; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Clinical Diabetes</em>, 43, 670–680 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.2337/cd25-0047">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2025</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Patients’ Preferences for Cytoreductive Treatments in Newly Diagnosed Metastatic Prostate Cancer: The IP5-MATTER Study</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Martin J. Connor; Mesfin Genie; Tim Dudderidge; Hangjian Wu; Johanna Sukumar; Mark Beresford; Diletta Bianchini; C. Goh; G. Horan; P. Innominato; V. Khoo; N. Klimowska-Nassar; S. Madaan; S. Mangar; S. McCracken; P. Ostler; S. Paisey; A. Robinson; B. Rai; N. Sarwar; N. Srihari; K. T. Jayaprakash; M. Varughese; M. Winkler; Hashim U. Ahmed; Verity Watson</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>European Urology Oncology</em>, 8, 663–673 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.euo.2024.06.010">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2025</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Impact of Vaccine Mandates and Removals on COVID-19 Vaccine Uptake in Australia and International Comparators: A Study Protocol</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Aregawi G. Gebremariam; Mesfin Genie; Huong Le; Katie Attwell; Bette Liu; Annette K. Regan; Frank H. Beard; Kristine Macartney; Francesco Paolucci; Hannah C. Moore; Christopher C. Blyth</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>BMJ Open</em>, 15, e097412 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2024-097412">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2024</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Doctor of Pharmacy Students’ Preferences for the Attributes of a Pharmacoeconomics Workshop: A Discrete Choice Experiment</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Surachat Ngorsuraches; Mesfin Genie; Anna Solomon</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>American Journal of Pharmaceutical Education</em>, 88, 101089 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ajpe.2024.101089">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2024</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Choice Consistency in Discrete Choice Experiments: Does Numeracy Skill Matter?</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Nabin Poudel; Francesco Paolucci; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 27, 1594–1604 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.07.001">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2024</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Political Determinants of COVID-19 Restrictions and Vaccine Rollouts: The Case of Regional Elections in Italy and Spain</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Pablo Arija Prieto; Marcello Antonini; Mehdi Ammi; Mesfin Genie; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy</em>, 145, 105082 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.healthpol.2024.105082">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2024</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Public Preferences for Vaccination Campaigns in the COVID-19 Endemic Phase: Insights from the VaxPref Database</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Marcello Antonini; Mesfin G. Genie; Arthur E. Attema; Katie Attwell; Zsolt J. Balogh; Daiga Behmane; Chiara Berardi; Shuli Brammli-Greenberg; Andrew Greenland; Terje P. Hagen; Madeleine Hinwood; C. James; A. Kellner; Brian Kelly; L. Murauskiene; N. McGregor; Alessia Melegaro; N. Moy; Ana Rita Sequeira; R. Singh; Aleksandra Torbica; Jeremy K. Ward; D. Yang; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 13, 100849 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2024.100849">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2024</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Willingness to Participate in Placebo-Controlled Surgical Trials of the Knee</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Laura Wall; Samantha Bunzli; Elizabeth Nelson; L. Hawke; Mesfin Genie; Madeleine Hinwood; Danielle Lang; M. Dowsey; P. Clarke; P. Choong; Zsolt J. Balogh; L. Lohmander; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>The Bone &amp; Joint Journal</em>, 106-B, 1408–1415 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1302/0301-620X.106B12.BJJ-2023-1266.R2">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2024</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Vaccine Uptake and Effectiveness: Why Some African Countries Performed Better than Others?</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Aregawi G. Gebremariam; D. Abegaz; H. Y. Nigus; T. L. Argaw; M. Gerbaba; Mesfin G. Genie; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 13, 100820 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2023.100820">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2024</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Vaccination and Non-pharmaceutical Interventions during COVID-19: Impact on Health and Non-health Outcomes in the US</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Asmita P. Khatiwada; Mesfin G. Genie; Aregawi G. Gebremariam; Tim C. Lai; Nabin Poudel; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 13, 100792 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2023.100792">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2023</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Keeping an Eye on Cost: What Can Eye Tracking Tell Us about Attention to Cost Information in Discrete Choice Experiments?</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Mandy Ryan; Nicolas Krucien</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Economics</em>, 32, 1101–1119 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.4658">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="other">
<div class="publication-year">2022</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">How Do Renewable Energy and Urbanization Cause Carbon Emissions? Evidence from Advanced Panel Estimation Techniques</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Y. Sun; H. Li; Z. Andlib; Mesfin G. Genie</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Renewable Energy</em>, 185, 996–1005 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.renene.2021.12.112">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="other">
<div class="publication-year">2022</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">The Role of Solar Energy and Eco-innovation in Reducing Environmental Degradation in China: Evidence from a QARDL Approach</div>
<div class="publication-authors">F. Chien; C.-C. Hsu; Z. Andlib; M. I. Shah; T. Ajaz; Mesfin G. Genie</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Integrated Environmental Assessment and Management</em>, 18, 555–571 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/ieam.4500">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2022</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Public Acceptability of Non-pharmaceutical Interventions to Control a Pandemic in the UK: A Discrete Choice Experiment</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Luis E. Loría-Rebolledo; Mandy Ryan; Verity Watson; Mesfin G. Genie; Ruben A. Sakowsky; Daniel Powell; Shantini Paranjothy</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>BMJ Open</em>, 12, e054155 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2021-054155">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2022</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">A Systematic Review of Patients’ Values, Preferences, and Expectations for the Treatment of Metastatic Prostate Cancer</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Martin J. Connor; Mesfin G. Genie; David Burns; E. J. Bass; M. Gonzalez; N. Sarwar; A. Falconer; S. Mangar; T. Dudderidge; V. Khoo; M. Winkler; Hashim U. Ahmed; Verity Watson</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>European Urology Open Science</em>, 36, 9–18 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.euros.2021.10.003">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2021</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">To Pay or Not to Pay? Cost Information Processing in the Valuation of Publicly Funded Healthcare</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Mandy Ryan; Nicolas Krucien</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Social Science &amp; Medicine</em>, 276, 113822 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socscimed.2021.113822">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="other">
<div class="publication-year">2021</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">The Trade-off between Economic Growth and Environmental Quality: Does Economic Freedom Asymmetry Matter for Pakistan?</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Muhammad Tariq Majeed; Zhiyuan Yu; Adnan Maqbool; Mesfin Genie; S. Ullah; Waheed Ahmad</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Environmental Science and Pollution Research</em>, 28, 41912–41921 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11356-021-13709-9">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2021</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Weighting or Aggregating? Investigating Information Processing in Multi-attribute Choices</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Nicolas Krucien; Mandy Ryan</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Economics</em>, 30, 1291–1305 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.4245">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2021</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Metastatic Prostate Cancer Men’s Attitudes towards Treatment of the Local Tumour and Metastasis Evaluative Research (IP5-MATTER): Protocol for a Prospective, Multicentre Discrete Choice Experiment Study</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Martin J. Connor; Mesfin G. Genie; Michael Gonzalez; N. Sarwar; K. T. Jayaprakash; G. Horan; F. Hosking-Jervis; N. Klimowska-Nassar; J. Sukumar; T. Pokrovska; D. Basak; A. Robinson; M. Beresford; B. Rai; S. Mangar; V. Khoo; T. Dudderidge; A. Falconer; M. Winkler; Verity Watson; Hashim U. Ahmed</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>BMJ Open</em>, 11, e048996 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2021-048996">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2020</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">The Role of Heterogeneity of Patients’ Preferences in Kidney Transplantation</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Antonio Nicolò; Giacomo Pasini</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Journal of Health Economics</em>, 72, 102331 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhealeco.2020.102331">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2020</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Understanding Public Preferences and Trade-offs for Government Responses during a Pandemic: A Protocol for a Discrete Choice Experiment in the UK</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin G. Genie; Luis E. Loría-Rebolledo; Shantini Paranjothy; Daniel Powell; Mandy Ryan; Ruben A. Sakowsky; Verity Watson</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>BMJ Open</em>, 10, e043477 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjopen-2020-043477">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2020</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">The COVID-19 Pandemic in Italy: Policy and Technology Impact on Health and Non-health Outcomes</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Chiara Berardi; Marcello Antonini; Mesfin G. Genie; G. Cotugno; A. Lanteri; Adrian Melia; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Health Policy and Technology</em>, 9, 454–487 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.hlpt.2020.08.019">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="preference">
<div class="publication-year">2018</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Does Cognitive Ability Affect Choice Consistency?</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin Genie</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>SSRN Electronic Journal</em> · <span class="status working">Working paper</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.3270180">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

## Book chapter

<div class="publication-list">
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2025</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Telehealth Evolution and Policy Response in Australia: Insights from the COVID-19 Pandemic</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Stefano Bruzzo-Gallardo; Mesfin Genie; R. Gallagher; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Information Technologies in the Healthcare Industry</em>, 561–592 · <span class="status">Published</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/B978-0-443-30168-1.00002-5">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

## Working papers and earlier versions

<div class="publication-list">
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2025</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Vaccinating Now or Vaccinating Later: Separating Pull-Forward and Net Effects Using a Dynamic Regression Discontinuity Design</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Fabio I. Martinenghi; Mesfin Genie; Katie Attwell; Huong Le; Hannah C. Moore; Aregawi G. Gebremariam; Bette Liu; Francesco Paolucci; Christopher C. Blyth</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>arXiv</em> · <span class="status working">Working paper</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2509.22714">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="other">
<div class="publication-year">2022</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Immigration and the Utilization of Preventive Care in Europe: Results from Retrospective Data</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Raluca Elena Buia; Mesfin Genie; Cristina Elisa Orso; Giacomo Pasini</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>SSRN</em> · <span class="status working">Earlier version</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.4269083">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2021</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Public Acceptability of Non-pharmaceutical Interventions to Control a Pandemic in the United Kingdom: A Discrete Choice Experiment</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Luis E. Loría-Rebolledo; Mandy Ryan; Verity Watson; Mesfin Genie; Ruben A. Sakowsky; Daniel Powell; Shantini Paranjothy</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>medRxiv</em> · <span class="status working">Earlier version</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1101/2021.10.12.21264883">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="public-health">
<div class="publication-year">2020</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">The COVID-19 Pandemic in Italy: Policy and Technology Impact on Health and Non-health Outcomes</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Chiara Berardi; Marcello Antonini; Mesfin Genie; G. Cotugno; A. Lanteri; Adrian Melia; Francesco Paolucci</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>SSRN</em> · <span class="status working">Earlier version</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.3680293">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>


## Data and other research outputs

<div class="publication-list">
<div class="publication-item" data-field="other">
<div class="publication-year">2019</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">Combining the Retrospective Interviews of Wave 3 and Wave 7: The Third Release of the SHARE Job Episodes Panel</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin Genie</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe</em> · <span class="status">Published dataset</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie#publications">University record</a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="publication-item" data-field="other">
<div class="publication-year">2019</div>
<div>
<div class="publication-title">SHARE Job Episodes Panel</div>
<div class="publication-authors">Mesfin Genie</div>
<div class="publication-meta"><em>Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe</em> · <span class="status">Published data product</span></div>
<div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.6103/SHARE.jep.800">DOI</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

:::
:::
